ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "session_connection_time" INTEGER /* Duration of the session connection in seconds */,
  "bytes_transferred" REAL /* Amount of data transferred in MB */,
  "kali_trace_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if Kali Linux trace was used */,
  "servers_corrupted" REAL /* Number of servers corrupted */,
  "pages_corrupted" INTEGER /* Number of pages corrupted */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the incident occurred */,
  "wpm_typing_speed" REAL /* Typing speed of the hacker in WPM */,
  "attack_vector" TEXT /* Type of attack vector used (e.g., phishing, malware) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "incident_category" TEXT /* Category of the incident (e.g., network, system, data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the incident occurred */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident where the server was corrupted */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the server */,
  "software_installed" TEXT /* Software installed on the server */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_servers_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corrupted page */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident where the page was corrupted */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the corrupted page */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the page */,
  "content_type" TEXT /* Type of content on the page (e.g., text, image, video) */,
  "sensitive_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the page contains sensitive data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_response_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident response team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Name of the team lead */,
  "response_plan" TEXT /* Incident response plan followed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident for which the report was generated */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that generated the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the incident report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES incident_response_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is part of */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the incident */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the access event (e.g., successful, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hacker_profiles" (
  "hacker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hacker profile */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident associated with the hacker */,
  "profile_details" TEXT /* Details of the hacker's profile */,
  "typing_speed" REAL /* Typing speed of the hacker in WPM */,
  "hacker_handle" TEXT /* Hacker's handle or alias */,
  "hacktivist_group" TEXT /* Name of the hacktivist group the hacker is part of */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hacker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hacker_profiles_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident that led to the prediction */,
  "prediction_details" TEXT /* Details of the prediction */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction (e.g., 0-1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident that triggered the alert */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that should respond to the alert */,
  "alert_details" TEXT /* Details of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES incident_response_teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that the dashboard is for */,
  "dashboard_details" TEXT /* Details of the dashboard content */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was last updated */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., incident, threat, vulnerability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES incident_response_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incident being collaborated on */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_details" TEXT /* Details of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES incident_response_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "threat_intelligence" (
  "threat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threat */,
  "threat_details" TEXT /* Details of the threat */,
  "threat_date" TEXT /* Date when the threat was reported */,
  "threat_source" TEXT /* Source of the threat intelligence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threat_id")
)
